description_long: This compact submachine gun features a matte gray camouflage finish with dark red accents on the barrel, folding stock, and other hardware. The body is constructed primarily from metal, with textured black polymer grip panels and a detachable box magazine. The top of the receiver is fitted with simple iron sights, and the rear stock is a wireframe folding design that wraps around the back of the weapon. The barrel is short and robust, with a red cylindrical muzzle device. The overall design is utilitarian and rugged, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, gray-camouflaged submachine gun with a folding wire stock, detachable box magazine, and red-accented barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel, front sight, and the wire stock folded along the side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the folding stock, magazine, and textured grip panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, rear sight, and the folded stock.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and the wire stock's hinge mechanism.
